subject: Test: Review claim F-1.4 (self-similarity)
body: Please review claim F-1.4: Fracttalix exhibits fractal self-similarity across at least 3 scale levels. The claim is based on wavelet analysis showing repeating structural motifs at scales 1x, 4x, and 16x. Do you find this methodology sound? Are 3 levels sufficient to claim self-similarity?

resolution.action: Test message. Grok responded with full QC review of F-1.4 (MSG-20260314-011244-eijp). Confirmed at 95% confidence.
